title: Limit the permitted filetypes in a board file column
excerpt: The Files column on boards is very versatile. I’d like the ability to limit it’s versatility, requiring that only one source (e.g. Google Docs, Monday WorkDocs, etc.) be permitted on a given board. In my use case, we hav…

posts.author: davidski (David Severski)
posts.cookedHtml:
The Files column on boards is very versatile. I’d like the ability to limit it’s versatility, requiring that only one source (e.g. Google Docs, Monday WorkDocs, etc.) be permitted on a given board. In my use case, we have a requirement that all documentation relevant to a certain board be within Google Docs. The current Files column allows many other file sources to be linked, which violates our standard (both a compliance issue as well as a search issue when outside of Monday).

Thanks for the consideration!
